title: Grit
author: Angela Duckworth
description: Build passion and perseverance for long-term goals with 4 skills drawn from the science of achievement and sustained effort.
longDescription: Angela Duckworth's research reveals that the secret to outstanding achievement is not talent but a special blend of passion and persistence she calls grit. These skills help you assess your own grit, design deliberate practice routines, discover a purpose that sustains motivation, and build a culture of grit in the groups you lead.
